prompt: Create a clean minimalist static ad on an off-white light gray studio background with a centered editorial layout. At the top, place a large luxury-fashion-style serif headline in black reading {argument name="headline text" default="Stop gambling with your ad spend."}, with the word "gambling" set in italic serif for emphasis. In the middle, show a vintage metal slot-machine window viewed straight on, slightly weathered and realistic, with 3 vertical reels inside a rectangular steel housing and a lever with a black knob on the right side. The 3 reels must display, from left to right, "$", "$", and "?". Make the rightmost reel background pale pink while the first 2 reels are aged white. Add a hand-drawn neon-pink annotation style over the image: 1 arrow-and-note on the left pointing to the first reel reading {argument name="left annotation" default="your attribution"}, 1 starburst scribble above the pink question-mark reel, 1 arrow from the question-mark reel to a circled note on the right reading {argument name="right annotation" default="actual revenue"}, and 1 large curved arrow in the lower left pointing toward the body copy area. Below the slot machine, center a short sans-serif paragraph in black reading {argument name="body text" default="See which campaigns drive revenue, not just clicks. Connect Meta, Google, and Stripe in 60 seconds."}. At the bottom center, place a simple black analytics-style bar logo icon followed by the bold sans-serif brand name {argument name="brand name" default="Humblytics"}. Use strong text fidelity, polished product-ad composition, soft studio shadows, restrained palette of black, steel gray, off-white, and hot pink, and a modern direct-response ad aesthetic.
translatedPrompt: 在灰白色调的摄影棚背景下，创建一个简洁的极简主义静态广告，采用居中的编辑排版。顶部放置一个黑色的大号奢侈时尚风格衬线体标题，内容为 {argument name="headline text" default="Stop gambling with your ad spend."}，其中“gambling”一词使用斜体衬线字以示强调。中间展示一个正视视角的复古金属老虎机窗口，略带风化感且真实，矩形钢制外壳内有 3 个垂直转轮，右侧配有一个带黑色旋钮的拉杆。3 个转轮从左到右依次显示“$”、“$”和“?”。最右侧转轮的背景设为淡粉色，前 2 个转轮为陈旧的白色。在图像上添加手绘霓虹粉色标注风格：左侧添加一个指向第一个转轮的箭头及注释，内容为 {argument name="left annotation" default="your attribution"}；在粉色问号转轮上方添加一个星形涂鸦；从问号转轮引出一个箭头指向右侧圈出的注释，内容为 {argument name="right annotation" default="actual revenue"}；左下角添加一个指向正文区域的大型弧形箭头。在老虎机下方，居中放置一段简短的黑色无衬线段落，内容为 {argument name="body text" default="See which campaigns drive revenue, not just clicks. Connect Meta, Google, and Stripe in 60 seconds."}。底部居中放置一个简单的黑色分析风格条形图 Logo 图标，后跟加粗的无衬线品牌名称 {argument name="brand name" default="Humblytics"}。要求文字清晰度高，产品广告构图精致，具有柔和的摄影棚阴影，配色方案限制在黑色、钢灰色、灰白色和亮粉色，并呈现现代直接响应式广告的美感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 极简老虎机归因广告：此提示词用于生成一张精致的静态营销广告，采用复古老虎机隐喻、手写标注以及居中排版的强力字体，适用于分析或归因软件的推广。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, minimalist, vintage, luxury, hand-drawn, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: neon]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
